chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Acquittal Appeal No.S-129 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For order on office objection (s) 2. For order on leave to appeal MA No.9414/2024 3. For order on exemption application M.A No.9415/2024 4. For hearing of main case 5. For order on M.A No.9416/2024 14.10.2025 None is present for the appellant. No intimation is received. Same was the case on last two dates of hearing. It appears that appellant has lost interest in the matter. Dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
